```{=html}
<div style="width:88%;margin:0 auto;background-image:radial-gradient(circle,#E0DBE5 0.6px,transparent 0.6px);background-size:18px 18px;padding:1.6em 1em 1.4em;border-radius:18px;">

 <div style="text-align:center;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#9B8EA0;letter-spacing:0.14em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:0.85em;">today's most accepted definition</div>

 <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:1em;">

  <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:0.5em;">
   <div style="width:3.4em;height:3.4em;border-radius:1em;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#DCE9FA,#B5D0F0);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#3A7DC9;box-shadow:0 6px 18px rgba(58,125,201,0.2);border:1.5px solid #B5D0F0;">
    <i data-lucide="bot" style="width:1.5em;height:1.5em;stroke-width:1.8;"></i>
   </div>
   <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.85em;font-weight:700;color:#3A7DC9;">Agent</div>
  </div>

  <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:1.5em;font-weight:300;color:#9B8EA0;line-height:1;">=</div>

  <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:0.5em;">
   <div style="width:3.4em;height:3.4em;border-radius:1em;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#F3E5F5,#E1BEE7);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#7B2CBF;box-shadow:0 6px 18px rgba(123,44,191,0.2);border:1.5px solid #E1BEE7;">
    <i data-lucide="brain" style="width:1.5em;height:1.5em;stroke-width:1.8;"></i>
   </div>
   <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.85em;font-weight:700;color:#7B2CBF;">Model</div>
  </div>

  <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:1.5em;font-weight:300;color:#9B8EA0;line-height:1;">+</div>

  <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:0.5em;">
   <div style="width:3.4em;height:3.4em;border-radius:1em;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#E8F5E9,#C8E6C9);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#2C8475;box-shadow:0 6px 18px rgba(44,132,117,0.2);border:1.5px solid #C8E6C9;">
    <i data-lucide="settings" style="width:1.5em;height:1.5em;stroke-width:1.8;"></i>
   </div>
   <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.85em;font-weight:700;color:#2C8475;">Harness</div>
  </div>

 </div>

 <div style="margin-top:1em;text-align:center;font-size:0.6em;color:#564232;line-height:1.5;">
  Agentic engineering = building the <span style="color:#2C8475;font-weight:700;">harness</span> around the model.
 </div>

</div>
```
